heading: Eligibility
label: 12575 Eligibility
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 14115 of Title 42

children.heading: Scholarships
children.label: a Scholarships
children.text: A person shall be eligible to receive a scholarship under this part if the person has been employed in law enforcement for the 2-year period immediately preceding the date on which assistance is sought.

children.heading: Ineligibility for student employment
children.label: b Ineligibility for student employment
children.text: A person who has been employed as a law enforcement officer is ineligible to participate in a student employment program carried out under this part.
